label: BrowserUse • navigate to pricing and report the price
query: Go to https://fixtures.local/home, find the Pro plan's monthly price on the pricing page, and report it.
notes: LIVE. Multi-step navigation: the price is NOT on the landing page — the model must follow the Pricing link (click or navigate) and read the pricing page (browser_read_page or the full-detail snapshot), then report the concrete number. Scores the digest for the grounded fact.

pages.title: Fixture SaaS — Home
pages.bodyText: Welcome to Fixture SaaS. The fastest way to do fixture things. See our Pricing page for plans.

pages.title: Pricing
pages.bodyText: Plans. Starter: $9 per month. Pro: $29 per month, includes unlimited fixtures. Enterprise: contact sales.
